heading: Omitted
label: 1707b to 1707d Omitted
notes: CodificationSections were omitted as part of the complete revision of the Agricultural Trade Act of 1978 () by , , . See chapter 87 (§ 5601 et seq.) of this title.Pub. L. 95–501Pub.
